slides.title: Decision intelligence for every function.
slides.body: Draft company presentation. Approved company proof will replace all visibly labeled placeholders.

slides.title: Businesses have more signals than ever and less confidence in what to do next.
slides.body: Alfred connects signals, evidence, decisions, approvals, and organizational memory.

slides.title: Dashboards show movement. Teams still have to assemble the decision.
slides.body: Context is fragmented across tools, functions, meetings, and individual memory.

slides.title: Decision intelligence is the layer between business data and accountable action.
slides.body: It detects change, traces evidence, recommends a path, and records the decision.

slides.title: Signal to evidence to recommendation to action.
slides.body: Each step remains visible, reviewable, and reversible where the workflow allows.

slides.title: A daily operating brief backed by inspectable evidence.
slides.body: Northwind Labs demo. This is product demonstration data, not Alfred company proof.

slides.title: Alfred closes the loop from detection through outcome.
slides.body: Human approval and audit history remain part of the product path.

slides.title: Alfred Core preserves decisions as reusable organizational memory.
slides.body: Source systems, provenance, business logic, approvals, and outcomes stay connected.

slides.title: Market sizing awaits approved sources and scope.
slides.body: No market number appears until source, period, currency, geography, and methodology are approved.

slides.title: Packaging follows operating scope and decision value.
slides.body: Approved pricing, contract structure, and expansion assumptions enter from campaign content.

slides.title: Land with one urgent decision path. Expand across functions.
slides.body: Visual system only. Campaign targeting, budgets, and media operations remain outside this repository.

slides.title: Each connected function increases context and reusable decision memory.
slides.body: Expansion claims require approved customer and product evidence.

slides.title: Alfred sits between passive reporting and autonomous action.
slides.body: Positioning dimensions are editable. Named competitors require approved research.

slides.title: Decision memory compounds with every reviewed outcome.
slides.body: The architecture records why a decision was made, who approved it, what happened, and what changed next.

slides.title: Company traction pending approved evidence.
slides.body: No fabricated metric is shown.

slides.title: Pipeline proof pending finance and sales approval.
slides.body: Stages, amounts, and conversion rates remain absent until approved.

slides.title: Retention and efficiency proof pending approval.
slides.body: Cohort, revenue, margin, and acquisition metrics remain absent.

slides.title: Financial plan pending approved model export.
slides.body: Every future chart will expose source, period, unit, scenario, and status.

slides.title: The team slide accepts approved people records and role evidence.
slides.body: Names, portraits, biographies, and prior-company marks remain absent until approved.

slides.title: Allocation pending approved round and operating plan.
slides.body: No amount or allocation percentage appears in the draft system.

slides.title: Every team should know what changed, why, and what to do next.
slides.body: Alfred becomes the trusted decision layer across the operating business.

slides.title: Reusable sections for product, market, security, finance, and legal diligence.
slides.body: Each divider inherits confidentiality, campaign version, owner, and approval status.
